title: Nathan O'Keefe
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Nathan O'Keefe''' is the author of "[[Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji]]," a [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club]] exclusive source article. Through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of Hyperspace O'Keefe previously wrote the backstories of [[Yavid]] and [[Teyora Rekab]], co-wrote the [[Diva Shaliqua/Legends|Diva Shaliqua]] backstory, and supplied the name for the [[Ottegru Grey]] backstory, all appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].

His alias is ''Valin Kenobi'' on [[StarWars.com]] and several other forums, and also [[User:Valin Kenobi|Valin Kenobi]] on [[Wookieepedia]].

He was also a staff member of The Unofficial Clone Wars Site.

==Works==
